description: Arquillian Container Test Implementation Base provides the base implementation for Arquillian's container test extension, wiring deployment generation, run-mode selection, protocol execution, and resource enrichment into the Arquillian test lifecycle. It supplies client and container-side controllers for starting containers, deploying archives, executing tests locally or remotely, and exposing container resources such as URLs, URIs, InitialContext, Deployer, and ContainerController.
